# services.scx-loader

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.scx-loader`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.scx-loader.config` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Configuration for `scx_loader`. See <https://github.com/sched-ext/scx-loader/blob/main/crates/scx_loader/configuration.md> for the full list of options. |
| `services.scx-loader.config.default_sched` | `null or string` | Default scheduler that will be started automatically when `scx_loader` starts. If not set or set to an empty string, `scx_loader` will not start any scheduler by default. |
| `services.scx-loader.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SCX Loader service, a daemon to run schedulers from userspace using dbus. This requires kernel version 6.12 and later.. |
| `services.scx-loader.package` | `package` | The scx-loader package to use. |
| `services.scx-loader.schedsPackages` | `list of package` | `scx` package to use. Defaults to `scx.rustscheds`, which includes all currently by `scx_loader` supported schedulers. |
